x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Now Assist for Strategic Portfolio Management enables AI-powered demand summarization, idea scoring, and portfolio insights. Without this plugin, portfolio and project teams cannot leverage generative AI to accelerate planning decisions and improve investment prioritization.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Install Now Assist for SPO from the ServiceNow Store to enable AI summarization and conversational intake.
